question: What is the definition of an Airship?

options.text: Lift is generated by airfoils, has a motor driven propulsion and uses control surfaces for steering.
Power-driven heavier-than-air aircraft supported in flight by the reactions of the air on one or more rotors.
Motor-driven, lighter-than-air aircraft where movement is controlled using motor driven propellers.
Take off and land vertically like a rotorcraft and also has the ability to transition into horizontal flight like a conventional aeroplane.

classification_notes: General UAS knowledge and UA-category topics are being tested.
